_comment: Read-only literature MCP servers handed to each Claude Agent SDK research session (research happens ONLY in agents via MCP; Anthropic-only; Agent SDK runs locally). Server names are fixed to pubmed/biorxiv/openalex so the allowlist mcp__pubmed__*, mcp__biorxiv__*, mcp__openalex__* matches. The loader substitutes ${ENV_VAR} placeholders from os.environ (repo .env) at launch; no secret values are stored here.
